form_answers.question: Is the Transition program currently approved in the budget?
Has the individual already completed their educational program?
Does the program have published fees?
Is the program a noncredit-bearing transition program?
Does the coursework address the individual’s valued outcome?
Does the coursework address skill-building and employment outcomes?
Are all staff/volunteers/trainers screened for criminal background & excluded-provider status? (letter)
Is the program provided in an OPWDD-certified location?
Can the program be funded by ACCES-VR, IDEA, or any other source?
